title: Universal Household Supplies Lint Roller and 2 Refills 10 Sheets Per Roll
description:
Sick and tired of lint covered clothing? The Universal Lint Roller with 2 refills will remove dust and lint from fabric easily! This set of lint rollers comes with one plastic handle that you can easily insert into the lint roller cylinder and 3 lint roller pads with 10 sheets each. Simply roll them on the clothing you'd like to remove lint from, tear off the adhesive paper and replace wit the protective paper for the next use. Make sure to keep a few of these around the house, office or workshop!
